content.title: Hobson TODOs
content.description:
-  Rename atom -> item ?

 - Export all as individual items - better for version control.

 - When item unminimised, it should come to top of container.

 - Why does bootloader have to pass require fn into kernel? Can't that live in kernel? Bootloader doesn't need to cache anything. If it is asked to boot, then by definition we want to reload module(s).

 - kernel.addChild knows about spatial windowing (it sets default position/size). Feels wrong?

 - Should import validate type chain? If so, then export needs to write items in correct order.

 - Utility to download 3rd party JS and convert to script item.

 - Add proper markdown editor.

 - Add proper code editor.

 - Sore default child window size in [system:preferences](item://00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000a)

 - Tag browser loses state when matching item clicked. Another full re-render problem.
